_comment: Documents the sanitization policy. scripts/leak-guard.mjs enforces leakGuard.regex in refresh and publish flows.

hardExclude._why: Never copied into the kit — machine-local, personal, or full-vault clones.
globs: 02 Projects/* (every real project except the bundled Demo Project)

tokenScrub._why: Residual personal tokens in otherwise-portable assets are mapped to scaffolder placeholders.

leakGuard._why: Refresh and publish flows fail if any of these survive in the scanned package payload. Bare 'atlassian.net' is intentionally NOT guarded — docs ship example org URLs; the real org is caught by 'fincompare'.
